name: TJX COMPANIES INC /DE/
summary: TJX Companies is the leading off-price apparel and home fashions retailer in the United States and worldwide, operating over 5,200 stores and six branded e-commerce sites. It operates chains including TJ Maxx, Marshalls, HomeGoods, Homesense, and Sierra in the U.S., Winners, HomeSense, and Marshalls in Canada, and TK Maxx and Homesense in Europe and Australia, offering brand name and designer merchandise at 20% to 60% below full-price retailers.

products.name: TJ Maxx
products.description: Off-price retail chain selling family apparel, accessories, home fashions, jewelry, and designer merchandise in the U.S.

products.name: Marshalls
products.description: Off-price retail chain offering family apparel, footwear, and home fashions in the U.S. and Canada.

products.name: HomeGoods
products.description: Leading off-price U.S. retail chain offering home fashions including furniture, rugs, lighting, and cookware.

products.name: Homesense
products.description: Off-price home fashions retail chain operating in the U.S., Canada, U.K., and Ireland.

products.name: Sierra
products.description: Off-price retailer of brand name active and outdoor apparel, footwear, and gear, with stores and sierra.com.

products.name: TK Maxx
products.description: Europe's largest major brick-and-mortar off-price apparel and home fashions retailer, also operating in Australia.

products.name: Winners
products.description: Leading off-price family apparel and home fashions retailer in Canada with 316 stores.

products.name: tjmaxx.com
products.description: E-commerce site for TJ Maxx, launched in 2013.

products.name: marshalls.com
products.description: E-commerce site for Marshalls, launched in 2019.

products.name: tkmaxx.com
products.description: E-commerce site for TK Maxx in Europe, launched in 2009.
